strengths: Demonstrated clear understanding of ligating loop technique phases
Showed proper instrument positioning during demonstration clips
weaknesses: Did not complete an actual timed task performance
Presented instructional content instead of executing the task

drills.name: Complete task execution drill
drills.description: Perform 5 full ligating loop tasks from start to finish with timer running, focusing on smooth transitions between all phases.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not complete an actual timed task performance

drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: 10 repetitions of opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage before tightening
drills.targets_weakness: Presented instructional content instead of executing the task

progression_note: At the intermediate level, you need to transition from understanding technique to executing complete timed performances. Focus on converting your theoretical knowledge into consistent task completion.
